description: Rebuild standalone dist and ZIP package after all fixes are applied.
steps: Run cd qi-webapp && npm run build:standalone to rebuild STP-Application.html
Run node verify-standalone.js to confirm the built file passes all 23 boot checks

Rebuild the ZIP: cp dist/STP-Application.html STP-Application.html && zip -9 dist/STP-Application-Package.zip dist/STP-Application.html samples/test-brief-asianet-express.md samples/test-brief-pacificlink.md samples/test-brief-transpacific-megagrid.md STP-Application.html && rm -f STP-Application.html
acceptance_criteria: dist/STP-Application.html exists and is the rebuilt standalone file
node verify-standalone.js passes all 23 checks against the dist file
dist/STP-Application-Package.zip exists and contains the HTML plus sample briefs
findings: Dist rebuilt successfully. All 23 verify-standalone.js boot checks pass. ZIP package contains the HTML file plus all 3 sample briefs. The dist HTML build shows version a51e9c6 at 5.40 MB with 12 vendor libs, 10 app modules, 5 textures inlined.
